allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const m=require\('mongoose'\); const Event=require\('./models/Event'\); \(async\(\)=>{ await m.connect\(process.env.MONGODB_URI||process.env.MONGO_URI\); const evs=await Event.find\(\).sort\({date:1}\); const now=new Date\(\); console.log\('now:',now.toISOString\(\)\); evs.forEach\(e=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\({title:e.title,date:e.date,recurringType:e.recurringType,recurring:e.recurring,past:e.date<now}\)\)\); await m.disconnect\(\); }\)\(\).catch\(e=>{console.error\(e.message\);process.exit\(1\);}\);")

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3059 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Output "Stopped PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Output "Nothing on 3059" })
